full_text:
Guanqiu Xiu 毌丘秀
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guanqiu Xiu (毌丘秀). Younger brother of Guanqiu Dian. Guanqiu Xiu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
